title: Backend Engineer
description: Who are we? Our business is technology, food and retail. We are a young team that combines all resources with technology; Our goal is to provide an excellent e-commerce service to meet your needs. In short, you can call us Migros One. 😉 Today, as a team that holds the “Great Place To Work” certificate with the contributions of our employees we produce, learn and develop together. We rediscover our passion for our business every day and build Migros One culture together. Our Culture We are #ONE to create a better tomorrow for our community. Our way of working includes four core values that we strive to act: 1. Take accountability with passion 2. Drive innovation with curiosity 3. Make a difference for our customers 4. Create open communication We live these values every day and create an environment where everyone enjoys working. Our business culture based on trust, openness and innovation has been recognized with our “Great Place To Work” certificate! What Do We Do? As Migros One; We spread happiness in being the pioneer of innovation in the field of food and retail technology with our brands Migros Sanal Market, Migros Hemen, Migros Extra, Migros Yemek, Macroonline, Tazedirekt, Mion and Petimo! Our determination to find fast and effective solutions always keeps us one step ahead. Our team's passion and energy make their jobs enjoyable. Thanks to our people-oriented approach, we aim to create a more comfortable and practical world for everyone by using them all. We constantly strive to provide the best experience to our consumers and employees!As Migros One team, we get excited with every member of our team creating his/her own career story! If you would like to be a part of this visionary and tech-savvy e-commerce team, don’t wait! Make your application! We are looking for Backend Engineer who will be on our team. What You'll Be Doing: Develop and maintain microservice-based backend services using Java and Spring Boot, Design, develop, and manage integration processes for RESTful APIs, Build services working with messaging infrastructures such as Kafka/SQS within an event-driven architecture, Write unit and integration tests, ensuring code quality and maintainability, Contribute to CI/CD processes and monitor logs, metrics, and alerts after deployment, Improve system performance, scalability, and fault tolerance, Work closely with Product, Analysis, QA, and DevOps teams. What You'll Bring: Minimum 3 years of experience as a back-end engineer, Experience with Java 17+, Spring Boot, Practical experience with microservice architecture, distributed systems, and inter-service communication, Hands-on experience with event-driven systems such as Kafka/SQS, Experience with relational databases such as PostgreSQL/MySQL, Familiarity with caching technologies such as Redis, Basic/practical knowledge of Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS services, Good understanding of Git, Maven/Gradle, and CI/CD pipeline processes, Experience with unit testing, integration testing, mocking, and TDD practices, Experience with logging, monitoring, and observability tools, Strong understanding of clean code, SOLID principles, design patterns, and code review culture.

title: Backend / System Engineer
description: EKİBİMİZİ BÜYÜTÜYORUZ | Backend / System Engineer Arıyoruz! Yüksek ölçeklenebilirlik, performans ve modern bulut mimarileri üzerine çalışan yenilikçi bir projede görev alacak güçlü bir Backend / System Engineer arıyoruz. Bu rol, sistem mimarisinin temelini oluşturacak ve projenin teknik omurgasını şekillendirecektir. Aradığımız Teknik Yetkinlikler ✅ Node.js (tercihen NestJS) ✅ REST API & GraphQL tasarımı ✅ Authentication sistemleri • JWT • OAuth ✅ Payment Integration deneyimi • Stripe ve benzeri ödeme altyapıları ✅ Database Design (Kritik Öncelik) • PostgreSQL • Normalization ↔ Performance optimizasyon dengesi • Ölçeklenebilir veri modeli tasarımı ✅ Caching teknolojileri • Redis ✅ Cloud & DevOps bilgisi • AWS / GCP • EC2, S3, RDS • Basic CI/CD süreçleri Kimleri Arıyoruz? • Sistem tasarımı konusunda güçlü bakış açısına sahip • Performans, güvenlik ve ölçeklenebilirliği önceliklendiren • Problem çözme becerisi yüksek • Modern backend mimarilerine hakim • Ürün geliştirme süreçlerinde aktif rol alabilecek takım arkadaşları Uzaktan / Hibrit çalışma opsiyonları değerlendirilebilir. Başvuru veya iletişim için: soru@settleandwork.com #Hiring #BackendDeveloper #SystemEngineer #NodeJS #NestJS #AWS #GCP #PostgreSQL #Redis #GraphQL #SoftwareEngineering #TechJobs #Startup #DeveloperJobs ENGLISH VERSION: WE ARE HIRING | Backend / System Engineer We are looking for a highly capable Backend / System Engineer to join an innovative and scalable technology project. This is a mission-critical role that will shape the core architecture and technical backbone of the platform. Required Technical Qualifications ✅ Strong experience with Node.js (preferably NestJS) ✅ REST API & GraphQL design ✅ Authentication systems • JWT • OAuth ✅ Payment Integration experience • Stripe or similar payment infrastructures ✅ Database Design (Highly Critical) • PostgreSQL • Strong understanding of normalization vs performance trade-offs • Scalable data architecture design ✅ Caching technologies • Redis ✅ Cloud & DevOps fundamentals • AWS / GCP • EC2, S3, RDS • Basic CI/CD pipelines What We Expect • Strong system design mindset • Focus on scalability, security, and performance • Problem-solving and analytical thinking skills • Experience with modern backend architectures • Ability to actively contribute to product development processes Remote / Hybrid working options may be available. To apply or get in touch: soru@settleandwork.com #Hiring #BackendEngineer #SystemEngineer #NodeJS #NestJS #AWS #GCP #PostgreSQL #Redis #GraphQL #SoftwareDeveloper #TechCareers #StartupJobs

title: Backend Engineer (Python / JavaScript) | $15/hr Remote
description: Position: SwarmBench Task Engineer SWE / Code Type: Short-Term Contract (4 weeks) Compensation: $15 per hour Location: Remote Commitment: 20-40 hours per week with 4 hours overlap with PST Role Responsibilities Build multi-agent benchmark tasks based on real-world open-source code changes such as bug fixes, migrations, and refactors Work with the Harbor evaluation framework to run and validate tasks inside Docker environments Write clear and precise task instructions specifying file paths, function signatures, expected behavior, and constraints Design and implement Python-based verification scripts to validate correctness of agent-generated code changes Create decomposition strategies that split complex code changes across multiple independent sub-agents Run, debug, and refine tasks within containerized environments to ensure reproducibility and determinism Evaluate task performance signals and improve task quality, clarity, and difficulty Contribute to benchmark development for advanced AI coding agents Requirements Strong years of experience in Python and JavaScript development Experience with AI coding benchmarks (e.g., SWE-bench, Terminal-Bench) Strong experience reading and navigating large open-source codebases (e.g., Django, Flask, FastAPI, Node.js, or similar) Familiarity with Git workflows including pull requests, diffs, cherry-picking, and working with specific commits Comfortable with Docker including writing Dockerfiles, building images, and debugging container issues Experience writing test scripts using pytest, unittest, or custom assertion-based testing Ability to write clear, precise, and unambiguous technical specifications Ability to work independently in a remote environment Application Process Apply/Easy Apply and check email for application form Fill Google form Assessment Link (After shortlisting to be completed within 24 hours)

title: Senior Full Stack AI Engineer
description: 📌 Biz Kimiz? Kafein Teknoloji, 2005 yılından bu yana teknoloji, bankacılık, telekomünikasyon, turizm, hizmet, perakende ve sigortacılık sektörlerinde ulusal ve global müşterilerinin yazılım ve teknoloji yönetimi ihtiyaçlarına yönelik hizmet, çözüm ve ürünler sunmaktadır. Mobil ödeme sistemleri, e-ticaret ve telekomünikasyon gibi sektörlerdeki projelerinin yanı sıra, büyük veri analizi, KVKK uyumluluğu, siber güvenlik ve mobil uygulama geliştirme alanındaki projeleri, Türkiye'nin önde gelen kurumlarında ve çeşitli ülkelerde başarıyla uygulanmaktadır. Kafein Teknoloji, sunduğu hizmet ve çözümlerin yanı sıra, global iş ortakları ve teknoloji geliştirme bölgesi olan teknopark içerisinde yürüttüğü Ar-Ge projeleriyle sektörde yenilikçi çözümler üretmeye devam etmektedir. Müşteri ihtiyaçlarına yönelik zengin ürün portföyüyle Kafein Teknoloji, veri yönetişimi ve güvenliği alanında rekabet avantajı sağlayan ürünler geliştirmektedir. Akıllı veri kullanımıyla daha verimli test süreçleri sunan TDM, veri tabanı etkinliğini izleme ve önlemeye yönelik Dataskope, kullanıcı dostu veri yönetimi aracı Data Touch ve hassas verilerin korunmasına yönelik veri yönetişimi çözümü Data Focus, Kafein Teknoloji’nin yenilikçi ürünlerden sadece birkaçıdır. Teknoloji sektöründeki yenilikleri yakından takip eden ve bu alandaki yeniliklere odaklanan Kafein Teknoloji, siber güvenlik alanındaki All-in Cyber ve bulut bilişim alanındaki All-in Cloud markaları ile müşterilerinin ihtiyaçlarına yönelik kapsamlı hizmet ve çözümler sunmaktadır. Siber güvenlik çözümleri markası All-in Cyber süreç, insan ve teknolojiyi birleştirerek, kurumların bilgi güvenliği seviyesini yükseltmekte ve siber saldırılara karşı etkili bir güvenlik çemberi oluşturmaktadır. Kafein Teknoloji’nin Google Cloud ile olan stratejik ortaklığı sonucu kurulan All-in Cloud, müşterilerin büyüme, inovasyon ve dijital dönüşüm süreçlerine destek olmak için bulut teknolojilerini erişilebilir hale getirmekte ve yenilikçi bulut teknolojileri sunmaktadır. Kafein Teknoloji sunduğu hizmet, çözüm ve ürünlerin yelpazesini büyütmek konusunda iştiraklerinden de faydalanmaktadır. Bu doğrultuda, siber güvenlik alanında başarılı bir ürün portföyüne sahip olan Karmasis ve Apifort Yazılım, Kafein Teknoloji’nin iştirakleri arasında yer almaktadır. Kafein Teknoloji, halka açılan Türkiye’nin 15. bilişim şirketi olarak, 2018-2023 döneminde konsolidede yıllık ortalama %70 büyüme oranına ulaşmıştır. 750 kişilik ekibi, global müşterileri ve iş ortaklarıyla birlikte kalite ve memnuniyet odaklı yenilikçi vizyonunu sürdürmekte ve sektörün öncü şirketleri arasındaki yerini güçlendirmeye devam etmektedir. 🎯 Genel Nitelikler ve İş Tanımı Üniversitelerin mühendislik bölümlerinden mezun, PL/SQL konusunda min. 6 yıl tecrübeli, Microservice mimarisinde min. 6 yıl deneyimli, AI, LLM konusunda tecrübeli, Tercihen React bilgisine sahip ve frontend development deneyimi bulunan, Devops (Openshift, Docker, Jenkins Pipeline vs.) konusunda bilgili, İleri seviye İngilizce bilgisine sahip. 🌟 Neden Biz? Kurumsal ve dinamik bir yapı Hibrit çalışma modeli Kapsamlı eğitim ve gelişim imkanları Teknolojiye yön veren, öğrenmeye açık bir ekip Teknolojiye yatırım yapan bir kültür Ar-Ge ve inovasyon odaklı projeler Takım ruhuna önem veren, kapsayıcı bir çalışma kültürü Sosyal etkinlikler ve iç iletişim faaliyetleri 🚀 Bize Katılın ve Geleceği Birlikte Şekillendirelim! 🔐 KVKK Aydınlatma Metni Başvurunuz sırasında bizimle paylaşacağınız kişisel verileriniz, 6698 sayılı Kişisel Verilerin Korunması Kanunu (KVKK) kapsamında yalnızca başvuru değerlendirme ve işe alım süreçlerinin yürütülmesi amacıyla Kafein Yazılım Hizmetleri Tic. A.Ş. tarafından işlenecek ve gerekli güvenlik önlemleri alınarak saklanacaktır. Bu işe başvurarak, özgeçmişinizin veri tabanımızda yer almasını kabul etmiş olduğunuzu bildirmek isteriz. Detaylı bilgiye KVKK Aydınlatma Metnimizden ulaşabilirsiniz.

title: Senior React Native Engineer
description: We are currently looking for a highly skilled React Native Engineer with strong mobile development expertise to join our team. If you are curious by nature, adaptive, collaborative, and always one step ahead, then join us and be a Commencer! Responsibilities Strong foundation in React Native and be able to develop complex mobile applications using React Native Deep understanding of mobile app development, including UI/UX design principles, performance optimization, and app architecture JavaScript experience and be able to write clean, modular, and maintainable code Experience using Redux to manage state in React Native applications Experience integrating with APIs and be able to design and develop API interfaces for mobile applications Familiar with the process of deploying mobile apps to the App Store and Google Play Store Develop cross-platform mobile applications that work on both iOS and Android devices Experience in writing unit tests, integration tests, and end-to-end tests for React Native applications. Familiar with CI/CD tools and be able to set up and maintain automated build and deployment pipelines that are specific for mobile deployments Problem-solving skills and be able to troubleshoot and debug complex issues in React Native applications Strong problem-solving skills and be able to troubleshoot and debug complex issues Strong communication and stakeholder management experience Experience developing software with TDD automation Qualifications 6+ years of overall software development experience, including at least 3 years of hands-on experience with React Native. Strong preference for React Native CLI development (Expo experience is welcomed) Experience with bridging and native modules (iOS/Android) Prior exposure to native Android and/or iOS development is a plus Familiarity with app store submission and release processes We want someone who builds mobile apps from a native mindset, understands the full mobile lifecycle, and is ready to deliver outstanding mobile experiences! Excellent interpersonal communication skills Excellent team player Good English communication skills Nice to Have Knowledge of material design frameworks Knowledge of AMPs, Progressive Web Apps, and similar Understanding of RESTful web services Knowledge of relational and non-relational database systems Understanding of distributed caching Understanding of cloud computing Contributions to OpenSource projects Why Commencis? We want people to thrive at Commencis. Here’s what Commencers like about working here: Competitive Compensation & Benefits: We offer a competitive salary, private health insurance, pension and retirement plans through a company-backed pension system, meal card, commute compensation, work-from home support and paid birthday off. Happier Weekdays: We offer flexible working hours including remote working option. Online events, guest speakers, refreshments in the office, meeting-light culture, and many more to enjoy the weekdays. Never Stop Learning: We support learning and development programs for almost anything. Additionally, we provide access to leading online e-learning platforms like Udemy and various libraries. Community & Socials: We are a tight-knit community that loves gathering. Our social activities include happy hours, workshops, new year party, breakfast & lunch get-togethers, movie nights, and our Summer Festival. Open Culture: We maintain a flat organizational structure with a culture of direct and open communication. We value Commencers’ voices and address any suggestions and questions you may have. About Commencis Join us in paving the way for a thriving digital society! Commencis has more than two decades of expertise in the world of experience design, software engineering and cloud technologies. Our products and solutions are used by leading brands in financial services, insurance, airlines and retail in more than 20 countries. We help our clients around the globe to commence their next evolution and pave the way for a thriving digital society. We love discovering what’s next. We value collaboration, curiosity, and an open mindset at work. If you share the same passion with our fellow Commencers, then let us unleash your world-class potential! We will process your personal data as part of our recruitment procedures. To find out more, please consult our Candidate Privacy Notices .

title: Backend Developer
description: CoForward is the solution for your human resources needs. Our consultancy strives to help our clients in any way that we can. CoForward carries out human resources consultancy services; this includes end-to-end recruitment for mid and c-level positions, employer branding, reorganisations, and talent management. We are seeking a Backend Developer for our client in the sector of Technology, Information and Internet. What You’ll Do? Build and improve scalable backend services used by millions of users, Collaborate with agile teams to deliver high-quality solutions, Develop clean, maintainable, and testable code, Contribute to distributed systems, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud-native environments. What We’re Looking For? Collaborative team player with a growth mindset and strong customer focus. 4+ years of experience in both of the following languages: with Java, Go, Strong knowledge of OOP, design patterns, clean code, refactoring, unit & integration testing, Experience with PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch, Couchbase. Hands-on experience with Kafka, RabbitMQ, Saga, and Outbox patterns, Familiarity with CI/CD practices, Terraform, and backend frameworks , Knowledge of distributed systems, Kubernetes, observability, and monitoring is a plus, Agile mindset, strong communication skills, and good command of English. CV’nizi Coforward ile paylaşmanız durumunda, kişisel verilerinizin Coforward tarafından aşağıda kısaca ve detaylı olarak web sitemizde belirtildiği şekilde işlenmesini ve Coforward'ın tüm bunlardan sorumlu olmayacağını kabul etmiş olursunuz. Bu bağlamda, lütfen KVKK kapsamında izin vermeyi tercih etmediğiniz kişisel verilerinizi Coforward ile CV'nizde ve/veya başka şekillerde paylaşmayınız. İşe Alma Seçme ve Yerleştirme hizmetimiz çerçevesinde kişisel verilerinizin Coforward tarafından nasıl işlendiğine ilişkin detaylı bilgiyi https://www.coforward.co/privacy-policy/ adresinde bulabilirsiniz. ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- If you share your CV with Coforward, you accept that your personal data shall be processed by Coforward as briefly stated below and in detail on our website, and Coforward shall not be responsible for all of these. In this context, please do not share your personal data on your CV and/or in other ways with Coforward, which you do not choose to give KVKK permission. Detailed information on how your personal data is processed by Coforward within the framework of our Recruitment Selection and Placement service, you can find that at https://www.coforward.co/privacy-policy/

title: Senior Frontend Developer (React)
description: Panates olarak geliştirdiğimiz kurumsal ölçekli yazılım ürünlerinde görev alacak, React konusunda güçlü S enior Frontend Developer arıyoruz. Bizim için frontend geliştirme sadece ekran üretmek değil; sürdürülebilir mimari kurabilmek, ölçeklenebilir component yapıları tasarlayabilmek, performans odaklı düşünebilmek ve iyi kullanıcı deneyimini güçlü mühendislikle birleştirebilmektir. Yapay zeka destekli geliştirme araçlarını etkin kullanabilen; ancak yazılım temelleri, problem çözme yeteneği ve gerçek coding becerileri güçlü adaylarla çalışmak istiyoruz. Sadece “vibe coding” yaklaşımıyla ilerleyen, ürettiği kodun neden çalıştığını analiz edemeyen adaylar bu pozisyon için uygun değildir. 🔑 Aranan Nitelikler React ile en az 4 yıl profesyonel uygulama geliştirme deneyimi Modern JavaScript (ES6+) ve TypeScript konusunda güçlü bilgi React Hooks, Context API ve modern state management yaklaşımlarında deneyim (Redux, Zustand, Recoil vb.) Component-driven development yaklaşımına hakim olmak Design System ve reusable component mantığı konusunda deneyimli olmak REST API, WebSocket ve gerçek zamanlı veri akışları ile çalışma deneyimi HTML5, CSS3, responsive design ve modern CSS yaklaşımlarına hakim olmak (Flexbox, Grid, Tailwind, SCSS vb.) Frontend performans optimizasyonu konusunda bilgi sahibi olmak (memoization, lazy loading, virtualization, code splitting vb.) Test süreçleri konusunda deneyim sahibi olmak (Jest, React Testing Library, Cypress vb.) Git ile aktif takım geliştirme deneyimi Yazdığı kodun maintainability, readability ve scalability etkilerini değerlendirebilecek mühendislik bakış açısına sahip olmak AI destekli geliştirme araçlarını verimli kullanabilmek; ancak bunlara bağımlı olmadan geliştirme yapabilecek seviyede teknik yeterliliğe sahip olmak ⭐ Tercih Sebepleri SaaS veya enterprise ürün deneyimi Dashboard / admin panel geliştirme deneyimi Storybook deneyimi Monorepo mimarileri hakkında bilgi sahibi olmak Performans kritik uygulamalarda çalışmış olmak Node.js ekosistemine aşinalık UI/UX hassasiyeti ve ürün bakış açısı 🔧 Sorumluluklar Ölçeklenebilir frontend mimarileri tasarlamak ve geliştirmek Temiz, sürdürülebilir ve test edilebilir kod yazmak Reusable component yapıları ve design system süreçlerine katkı sağlamak Performans, erişilebilirlik ve kullanıcı deneyimi odaklı geliştirme yapmak Tasarım, backend ve ürün ekipleriyle yakın çalışmak Geliştirme, test, entegrasyon ve deployment süreçlerinde aktif rol almak Mevcut sistemleri analiz ederek teknik iyileştirme ve refactoring süreçlerine katkı sağlamak 📍 Konum Novus Tower, Bayraklı, Adalet Mah. - İZMİR 💎 Yan Haklar Yemek kartı Özel sağlık sigortası Udemy ve benzeri platformlardan sınırsız eğitim erişimi Devlet veya özel üniversitelerde lisans / yüksek lisans bursu (%100)

title: Senior Backend Developer
description: ABOUT Jotform Jotform is a San Francisco-based SaaS company with more than 35 million users worldwide. We are thriving and growing, and we’ve never needed outside funding. That’s because we like keeping things agile, independent and fun. Jotform believes everyone should be able to create their own online forms. Our 10,000+ ready-made form templates, 100+ integrations and more than 380 widgets have made us one of the most popular online form builders for organizations of all sizes — from small businesses to enterprises. Since our inception in 2006, our mission has been to help users create, manage and share online forms and receive responses in the easiest way possible. ABOUT THE ROLE As a rapidly growing company, Jotform is seeking a Senior Backend Developer in our İzmir office, located at a relaxed fun environment in Teknopark İzmir. Here’s what you will be doing: Work closely with product management, front end developers, devOps and designers Design, build and deploy new features for Jotform Deliver solutions in a continuous integration flow to production having 35 million users Review and iterate architecture to ensure scale along with the growth Education & Work Experience & Technical Requirements: BS Degree in Computer Science/Engineering or related technical field or equivalent practical experience 5+ year experience building web applications Proficiency in PHP Familiarity with Distributed Systems programming Experience in SaaS and high traffic applications are highly preferred Understanding of HTML, CSS, Javascript, React and other web technologies Solid understanding of OOP principles Working experience with CI/CD and related tools like Git and Jenkins Ability to write high-performance, maintainable and reusable code Excellent command of English Personal Specifications/Skills: Demonstrated ability to work independently with minimal supervision A passion to learn and keep up with the latest technologies Jotform PERKS High growth-paced environment with collaborative and unique team culture Generous market competitive total compensation package Health Insurance Professional Growth & Career Opportunities: We support your personal and professional development with educational materials and expenses & relevant conferences abroad to stay up to date with the latest industry trends & online courses or coaching - and support you pursuing ones that you are passionate about! Challenging projects, regular feedback, healthy competition Fun & Relax working environment: When we’re in the office; music, jeans and t-shirts are the norm & kitchens stocked with healthy & tasty snacks & drinks OUR PROCESS We’ll review your application along with all the others we receive and pick the top profiles for a screening call. In many cases due to time constraints and our candidate volume, only the short-listed candidates are contacted but we do consider each application carefully. If you have been selected as a short-listed candidate, we will contact you for a short screening call to get to know you better. If you don’t get a call, please don’t be disappointed! We receive many applications for each role and have to prioritize who we speak to. Thank you for taking the time to apply for a position at Jotform! Jotform is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, religion, national or ethnic origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, disability, protected veteran status or other characteristics protected by law. https://www.jotform.com/job-applicant-privacy/

title: Mid-Level Fullstack Engineer (Node&React)
description: This position is open to engineers based in Serbia or Türkiye The position is for a B2B/freelancing cooperation and it is a long-term contract engagement About Us We are a leading product development partner specializing in custom web and mobile application development. With Silicon Valley founders and top-tier European tech talent, we operate from Prague and have successfully delivered over 65 software products for early-stage startups, scaleups, and global enterprises. Founded in 2016 Headquartered in Prague Built and launched 65+ products 85+ team members Driving product innovation for leading US companies At OAK’S LAB, we take an AI-first approach, utilizing AI on almost every project. From streamlining design and testing workflows to enhancing developer productivity, our teams leverage tools such as Figma MCP Server, Playwright MCP Server, and Cursor, and we’re actively experimenting with remote AI agents to push the boundaries of what’s possible in product development. OUR PROJECTS Here are a few from our portfolio: Nasdaq Private Market (Series C, Finance)- nasdaqprivatemarket.com Blackpoint Cyber (Series B, Cybersecurity) - blackpointcyber.com OpenLoop (Series A, Healthcare) - openloophealth.com THE ROLE Our product development team is looking for a Fullstack Engineer who combines creative thinking, exceptional problem-solving skills, and technical expertise to build outstanding web and mobile applications for our clients. You’ll play a key part in building and scaling impactful digital products from the ground up. You’ll work as part of a dedicated product team alongside a Tech Lead, Product Manager, Designer, and a talented group of engineers, driving the success of innovative companies. Your role will involve actively contributing to the software development process and engaging with the team and business. You’ll be participating in discussions, providing technical input, and ensuring the delivery of high-quality software solutions that meet user needs and project goals. You’ll also have the opportunity to join our internal AI Guild, a community where engineers share insights, experiment with cutting-edge AI tools, and learn from one another. Responsibilities Design, develop, and version high-quality web and mobile applications Collaborate with product teams to understand feature requirements and translate them into technical solutions Be accountable for an area of the application, its delivery, production-level quality, and its effective presentation to stakeholders Understand the product and user needs to prioritize business value and functionality Ensure the application meets all requirements of security and scalability Write clean and scalable code Skills & Requirements 3+ years of experience in building digital products using Node.js & React Experienced with Javascript/Typescript Proficient in English Focus on code quality Desire to learn new technologies and apply AI in your workflow Strong analytical and problem-solving skills Proactiveness and the capability to make a difference Driven, hard work ethic, showing commitment Ability to work effectively in a team environment, following Agile methodologies Experience with Python is beneficial but not essential OUR TECH STACK Typescript Node.js React + Next.js React Native GraphQL, tRPC Material UI Playwright PostgreSQL Google Cloud Platform Python AI Tools: Figma MCP Server, Playwright MCP Server, Cursor, Remote Agents Important Notice: OAK'S LAB communication, including interview requests and job offers, are only sent from an " @ oakslab.com " or " @ oaks-lab.com " email addresses (e.g., john@oakslab.com or john@oaks-lab.com). Any message from a different email domain is not associated with OAK'S LAB. We will never ask for payment information or banking details via email, phone, or any other communication channel during the interview process. If you receive messages using our name, domain, or brand assets in an attempt to impersonate us or act on our behalf, do not engage. Instead, report it to Econsumer.gov at Government Shutdown Notice / Aviso de cierre del gobierno (if you are in the EU), Federal Trade Commission (FTC) at Government Shutdown Notice / Aviso de cierre del gobierno , or the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) in case of investment fraud at SEC.gov | Report Suspected Securities Fraud or Wrongdoing (if you are in the US).

title: Senior React Native Developer
description: ABOUT Jotform Jotform is a San Francisco-based SaaS company with more than 35 million users worldwide. We are thriving and growing, and we’ve never needed outside funding. That’s because we like keeping things agile, independent and fun. Jotform believes everyone should be able to create their own online forms. Our 10,000+ ready-made form templates, 100+ integrations and more than 380 widgets have made us one of the most popular online form builders for organizations of all sizes — from small businesses to enterprises. Since our inception in 2006, our mission has been to help users create, manage and share online forms and receive responses in the easiest way possible. ABOUT THE ROLE Jotform is seeking Senior React Native Developers in our Ankara office, located at a relaxed fun environment in Hacettepe University Teknokent. As a rapidly growing company we are hiring for similar positions continuously and once an opportunity matches with your qualifications, we will contact you immediately. Here’s what you will be doing: Work on React Native to create Android/iOS Apps Work on ReactJS to develop web applications Develop cross-browser, cross-platform compatible solutions Develop scalable, reliable, maintainable and reusable code Deliver solutions in a continuous integration flow to live system having 30 million users Test your code and solutions with A/B tests and/or via feedbacks from the user testing services Work closely with product management, back-end developers, DevOps and designers Come up with ideas to improve user experience and openly sharing them with the team Attend hackathons with utmost passion to try new things Education & Work Experience & Technical Requirements: Bachelor’s degree in CS/CENG or in a related technical field or equivalent practical experience 6 years of experiences in Frontend or Mobile Development Deep knowledge of React Native, ReactJS and Redux Proficiency in JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, AJAX Working experience with Git Preferably experience in SaaS Excellent command of English Superior communication and interpersonal skills A passion to learn and keep up with the cutting edge technologies Ability to write high-performance, maintainable and reusable code Ability to work independently with minimal supervision Jotform PERKS High growth-paced environment with collaborative and unique team culture Generous market competitive total compensation package Health Insurance Professional Growth & Career Opportunities: We support your personal and professional development with educational materials and expenses & relevant conferences abroad to stay up to date with the latest industry trends & online courses or coaching - and support you pursuing ones that you are passionate about! Challenging projects, regular feedback, healthy competition Fun & Relax working environment: When we’re in the office; music, jeans and t-shirts are the norm & kitchens stocked with healthy & tasty snacks & drinks OUR PROCESS We’ll review your application along with all the others we receive and pick the top profiles for a screening call. In many cases due to time constraints and our candidate volume, only the short-listed candidates are contacted but we do consider each application carefully. If you have been selected as a short-listed candidate, we will contact you for a short screening call to get to know you better. If you don’t get a call, please don’t be disappointed! We receive many applications for each role and have to prioritize who we speak to. Thank you for taking the time to apply for a position at Jotform! Jotform is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, religion, national or ethnic origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, disability, protected veteran status or other characteristics protected by law. https://www.jotform.com/job-applicant-privacy/

title: PHP/Laravel Yazılım Uzmanı & Mobil APP
description: Oyuncu ve model ajansı olarak faaliyet gösteren yapımız bünyesinde; ajans yönetim panelleri, oyuncu–model başvuru sistemleri, kullanıcı ve içerik yönetimi altyapıları ile web ve mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerini birlikte yürütecek deneyimli bir Yazılım Uzmanı ile freelance ve proje bazlı iş birliği hedeflenmektedir. Bu pozisyon tam zamanlı bir işe alım değildir. Belirli projelerde, uzun vadeli ve sürdürülebilir bir iş birliği anlayışıyla çalışılması amaçlanmaktadır. Projeler yılın belirli dönemlerinde aktif olarak geliştirilmekte ve güncellenmektedir. Ayrıca; oyuncu ve model ajansı dışında, reklam ve dijital projeler üreten ayrı bir yapımız bulunmaktadır. Dileyen adaylarla bu yapı altında da ek freelance yazılım projeleri gerçekleştirilebilecektir. Görev ve Sorumluluklar Mevcut web tabanlı yönetim panellerinin geliştirilmesi ve yeniden yapılandırılması AngularJS tabanlı admin panel altyapılarının bakımı, geliştirilmesi ve modern backend mimarileri ile entegrasyonu Mevcut backend yapılarının Laravel framework’ü ile yeniden kurgulanması ve iyileştirilmesi Oyuncu & model başvuru sistemleri, ajans içi yönetim panelleri ve özel modüllerin geliştirilmesi Web projelerle entegre çalışan mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerinde aktif rol almak Mobil uygulamalar için gerekli backend servislerinin ve RESTful API’lerin geliştirilmesi AWS veya benzeri cloud sunucu altyapılarında kurulum, taşıma, yönetim ve performans optimizasyonu Üçüncü parti servisler, ödeme sistemleri ve harici API entegrasyonlarının yürütülmesi WordPress tabanlı kullanıcı arayüzleri ile özel yazılım sistemleri arasında entegrasyon sağlanması Aranan Nitelikler PHP & MySQL konusunda ileri seviye bilgi sahibi Laravel framework’ü ile aktif ve profesyonel proje tecrübesi olan AngularJS veya benzeri JavaScript tabanlı admin panel yapılarıyla çalışma deneyimi Legacy sistemlerin modern framework’lere (özellikle Laravel) taşınması konusunda tecrübeli Mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerinde deneyimli (Flutter, React Native veya benzeri teknolojilerle geliştirme yapmış ya da bu süreçleri backend tarafında uçtan uca yönetmiş) Mobil uygulamalarla entegre çalışan backend servisleri ve API’ler geliştirmiş AWS veya benzeri sunucu sistemlerinde (EC2, S3, RDS vb.) deneyimli HTML, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, Bootstrap teknolojilerine hâkim API geliştirme ve entegrasyon süreçlerinde tecrübeli Minimum 5 yıl profesyonel yazılım geliştirme tecrübesi Freelance ve proje bazlı çalışma disiplinine uygun Sorumluluk sahibi, güvenilir ve çözüm odaklı Teknik dokümanları okuyabilecek düzeyde İngilizce bilgisi İş Birliği ve Ödeme Modeli Çalışma modeli freelance ve proje bazlıdır İş başlangıcında karşılıklı sözleşme yapılır Ödemeler, proje teslimi ve test süreçlerinin onaylanmasının ardından gerçekleştirilir Projeler yılın belirli dönemlerinde düzenli olarak geliştirilmektedir Uzun vadeli, karşılıklı güvene dayalı iş birlikleri önceliklidir
